product.name: ArSport El
product.specLine: 240 g/m², 92% Polyester 8% Elastane Interlock Knit Fabric
descriptions: ArSport El elastic interlock knit fabric for team uniforms. With high content of elastane the fabric give extra confort to the wearer. Certified for EN 20471.
It is suitable for sublimation printing.
240 g/m², 92% Polyester 8% Elastane Interlock Knit Fabric
technicalParameters: Fiber | 92% Polyester 8% Elastane (PES) | TS EN ISO 1833
Dimensinal Change | -5% < Length < +5% ; -5% < Width < +5% | TS EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1

acceptedMatches.rationale: Explicit certification to EN ISO 20471 and stated 'High Visible: Yes' directly support high-visibility application.

possibleButNotAccepted.reason: Product is explicitly positioned as a sports knit for team uniforms with T-shirt application, directly indicating sport use.

primary.rationale: The fabric is explicitly certified to EN ISO 20471 and marked 'High Visible: Yes', which directly qualifies it as a certified high-visibility warning fabric, making this the most defensible primary application.

evidence: descriptions: 'elastic interlock knit fabric for team uniforms'
secondary.rationale: The product is explicitly described as being for team uniforms and T-shirt application within the ArSport sports knit family, independently supporting a sport end use alongside its hi-vis certification.

alternativesConsidered.reasonNotSelected: Hi-vis certification and team-uniform framing point to a more specific sector than generic industrial workwear.
